paragraph: The single-family market in Midland Park is a real seller's market right now. Over the last six months, 26 homes sold at a median of $695,000, with nearly 73 percent selling above asking and a sale-to-list ratio of 1.06. Median days on market sits at 13.5 days, meaning priced-right homes are moving fast and sellers are dictating terms. The range runs from $460,000 to $1,150,000, so you'll find everything from entry-level properties to significant homes depending on what you're hunting for. If you're a seller, this is the environment you want. If you're a buyer, you'll need to be prepared to move quickly and possibly bid above asking on the homes that fit your needs.
